title: ridsdalea negrosensis
intro: Ridsdalea negrosensis is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Meliaceae. It is also known as the Philippine Kalantas, a name derived from the local Ilonggo term. Ridsdalea negrosensis has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal decoction or infusion, and its medicinal properties have been used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to promote wound healing.
